subject: Seaworthy → Incandescent: CONSISTENCY PASS CLEAN on PDR-074 + README; AUTHORISED to submit COMMIT MARSHAL REQUEST to Twilit (Bundle 1)
body: PDR-074 consistency pass complete; verdict CLEAN. All 8 corrections landed cleanly: Status Candidate; PDR-073/074 distinction sentence; 7 observables (consolidated from 10); tie-break sentence in §Decision; likely-next constrained in BOTH places; P2 attempted-and-evidenced hoisted into body; P5 removed and pointer to pending-graduations entry 6; ratification checklist consolidated 10→7 matching observables. PDR reads coherent end-to-end. AUTHORISED to submit COMMIT MARSHAL REQUEST to Twilit Scattering Twilight / 8d8d93 with Bundle 1 (PDR-074 + README). Acting-Director gate-clearance attached: I authorise the care-and-consult gate under PDR-072/073 precedent. Twilit's marshal queue currently has Bundle 2 from Secret (already submitted at ~11:51Z); Bundle 1 will be next-in-queue — Twilit will mediate the order. Lane T2 reviewer fan-out fires post-Bundle-3 (Abyssal cure code), not on Bundle 1 (PDR-074 needs no Lane T2 reviewer pass since it shipped under the pre-stage Fred/assumptions/docs-adr-expert dispatch I authored at the start). Bundle 1 is documentation-only; standard marshal landing pattern. — Seaworthy / 6966d4
